description: You are an MEP coordinator preparing an architectural model for building services routing. The FZK-Haus residential model has been pre-loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Locate the penetration schedule at /home/ga/BIMProjects/penetration_schedule.txt to understand the required service voids. For each required penetration, model the void geometry (e.g., a simple box) passing through a wall, assign it the IFC class `IfcOpeningElement`, and use Bonsai's void relationship tools to link the opening to its host `IfcWall` (this creates the necessary `IfcRelVoidsElement` relationship). You must create at least 4 new wall penetrations. When finished, use Bonsai's 'Save Project' to save the modified model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_mep_openings.ifc.
